title: The 12 Week Year

posts.author: HarrySC (Harry Stephenson Clarke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anyone read “The 12 Week Year”?
If not i would highly recommend it. I found this blog https://monday.com/blog/productivity/12-week-year-time-management-system/, but I could not actually find any templates to actually use?

Can anyone make the template, or help with Monday.com creating the template?

I firmly believe that it would greatly assist all users with their efficiencies and business growth.
